progress.verification: 4 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime
progress.new_capability: Seven Cloudflare verifier states are normalized into provenance-preserving receipts and a fail-closed SLSA Verification Summary Attestation.

remaining_blocker: Configure CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN in the cloudflare-research GitHub environment, dispatch the deployment workflow, preserve the verifier outputs, then cryptographically sign and independently verify the summary before evidence acceptance.
handoff: Wire build-verification-summary.mjs into the deployment workflow artifact set after the explicit verification-input manifest is produced; preserve unsigned FAILED behavior until a trusted signature verifier is available.
